expression.expression: * EXCLUDE("STATE_FIPS_CODE", "COUNTY_FIPS_CODE", "PERCENTAGE BELOW POVERTY LEVEL", "AMI", "HOUSING UNITS", "MEDIAN MONTHLY HOUSING COST- OWNER", "MEDIAN MONTHLY HOUSING COST  - RENTER", "PERCENT INCOME PAID AS RENT")
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((GEOID IS NULL) OR (GEOID = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))
CAST((("SUM_    FOR RENT" / "SUM_TOTAL VACANT HOUSES") * 100) AS INTEGER)
CAST((("SUM_    RENTEDCOMMA NOT OCCUPIED" / "SUM_TOTAL VACANT HOUSES") * 100) AS INTEGER)
CAST((("SUM_    FOR SALE ONLY" / "SUM_TOTAL VACANT HOUSES") * 100) AS INTEGER)
CAST((("SUM_    SOLDCOMMA NOT OCCUPIED" / "SUM_TOTAL VACANT HOUSES") * 100) AS INTEGER)
CAST((("SUM_    FOR MIGRANT WORKERS" / "SUM_TOTAL VACANT HOUSES") * 100) AS INTEGER)
* EXCLUDE("SUM_    FOR SALE ONLY", "SUM_    RENTEDCOMMA NOT OCCUPIED", "SUM_    SOLDCOMMA NOT OCCUPIED", "SUM_    FOR MIGRANT WORKERS", "SUM_    FOR RENT")

properties.schema: [{"name": "INCOME CATEGORY", "dataType": "String"}, {"name": "GEOID", "dataType": "String"}, {"name": "TWO OR MORE RACES", "dataType": "Float"}, {"name": "WHITE ONLY", "dataType": "Float"}, {"name": "BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN ONLY", "dataType": "Float"}, {"name": "AMERICAN INDIAN AND ALASKA NATIVE ONLY", "dataType": "Float"}, {"name": "ASIAN ONLY", "dataType": "Float"}, {"name": "NATIVE HAWAIIAN AND OTHER PACIFIC ISLANDER ONLY", "dataType": "Float"}, {"name": "SOME OTHER RACE ONLY", "dataType": "Float"}]

expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN ((AMI > 0) AND (AMI < 27750)) THEN 'Extremly Low' WHEN ((AMI > 27750) AND (AMI <= 41450)) THEN 'Very Low    ' WHEN ((AMI > 41450) AND (AMI <= 66300)) THEN 'Low         ' WHEN ((AMI > 66300) AND (AMI <= 96120)) THEN 'Moderate    ' WHEN (AMI > 96120) THEN 'Upper       ' ELSE 'None        ' END) AS string)
(CASE WHEN ("MEDIAN MONTHLY HOUSING COST- OWNER" < 0) THEN 0 ELSE "MEDIAN MONTHLY HOUSING COST- OWNER" END)
(CASE WHEN ("MEDIAN MONTHLY HOUSING COST  - RENTER" < 0) THEN 0 ELSE "MEDIAN MONTHLY HOUSING COST  - RENTER" END)
* EXCLUDE("MEDIAN MONTHLY HOUSING COST- OWNER", "MEDIAN MONTHLY HOUSING COST  - RENTER")

expressions.alias: "NATIVE HAWAIIAN AND OTHER PACIFIC ISLANDER ONLY"
